title: 机械物流工坊CLW【Create Logistics Workshop】
description:
Logistics factory built using mechanical power
利用机械动力制作的物流工厂
body:
欢迎来到这款以工业发展与趣味生活为特色的我的世界整合包！
本整合包基于机械动力最新版本精心打造，深度融合了各类机械动力附属模组，为你搭建起一个规模宏大、运转精妙的工厂体系。借助机械动力及其附属模组的丰富内容，你能够设计并建造出自动化程度极高的生产线，体验从基础资源采集到复杂成品制造的完整工业流程，感受科技与机械交织带来的无限魅力。
同时，整合包中增添了 “农夫乐事” 模组，为游戏注入了别样的趣味性。在这里，你将体验到更加真实且丰富的农耕生活，种植各类特色作物，养殖多样牲畜，收获琳琅满目的农产品。
特别值得一提的是，整合包引入了独特的货币系统。货币无法通过常规合成方式获取，这赋予了货币特殊的价值属性。房主可依据自身创意与游戏规划，自由设定货币交易规则与方式。你可以凭借在工厂劳作、农场经营所获的收益，在不同主题的机械动力商店中消费，这些商店依据不同食物类型划分，每一种食物对应独特的商品与服务，进一步丰富了游戏的经济生态与玩法维度。
快来加入这个充满创造与探索乐趣的整合包世界，开启一场前所未有的冒险之旅吧！


Welcome to this My World Integrated Package featuring industrial development and fun life!
This integrated package is carefully built based on the latest version of mechanical power and deeply integrates various mechanical power accessory modules to build a large-scale and sophisticated factory system for you. With the rich content of mechanical power and its auxiliary modules, you can design and build highly automated production lines, experience the complete industrial process from basic resource collection to complex finished product manufacturing, and feel the infinite charm brought by the interweaving of technology and machinery.
At the same time, the "Farmer's Fun" module has been added to the integrated package, injecting a different kind of interest into the game. Here, you will experience a more authentic and rich farming life, planting various specialty crops, breeding diverse livestock, and harvesting a wide variety of agricultural products.
It is particularly worth mentioning that the integration package introduces a unique monetary system. Currency cannot be obtained through conventional synthesis methods, which gives currency special value attributes. Homeowners can freely set currency transaction rules and methods based on their own ideas and game plans. You can rely on the income from working in factories and operating farms to consume it in machine-power stores with different themes. These stores are divided according to different food types. Each food corresponds to unique goods and services, further enriching the economic ecology of the game. and gameplay dimensions.
Come and join this world of integrated packages full of fun of creation and exploration, and embark on an unprecedented adventure!
